message:
test(planner): convert debug_test_join_order to proper test assertions

Replace println!-based debugging with proper test assertions that verify
join ordering behavior. The original test was likely used during development
to inspect output but left no automated verification.

Changes:
- Rename: debug_test_join_order → test_join_order_returns_each_table_once
- Add assertion: join_order length equals input tables count
- Add assertion: all table names in join_order are unique (via HashSet)
- Add assertion: every input table appears exactly once in join_order

This ensures the join ordering algorithm:
1. Doesn't duplicate tables in the plan
2. Doesn't omit any tables
3. Produces a valid permutation of the input

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
